nodes.label: Note On
nodes.description: MIDI note-on event triggers startVoice(), initializing the envelope

nodes.label: Attack Time Modulation
nodes.description: VoiceStartModulator chain evaluated once at note-on to scale the attack time

nodes.label: Attack
nodes.description: Base attack time in milliseconds (0-20000, default 5)

nodes.label: Attack Time Calculation
nodes.description: Multiplies Attack parameter by chain modulation value, then computes per-voice coefficients (linear delta or exponential coef/base)

nodes.label: LinearMode
nodes.description: Selects between linear ramp and exponential curve formulas for both attack and release

nodes.label: Attack Stage
nodes.description: Per-sample ramp from 0 to 1. Linear: value += delta. Exponential: value = base + value * coef. Transitions to SUSTAIN when value >= 1.0

nodes.label: Sustain Stage
nodes.description: Holds at 1.0 using SIMD fill (no per-sample loop). Active while note is held after attack completes

nodes.label: Note Off
nodes.description: MIDI note-off event triggers stopVoice(), transitioning envelope to release

nodes.label: Release
nodes.description: Release time in milliseconds (0-20000, default 10). Shared across all voices (not modulatable)

nodes.label: Release Stage
nodes.description: Per-sample ramp from current value to 0. Linear: value -= delta. Exponential: value = base + value * coef. Transitions to IDLE when value <= threshold

nodes.label: Idle
nodes.description: Output is 0.0 via SIMD fill. Voice is marked as finished (isPlaying returns false)

nodes.label: Modulation Output
nodes.description: Per-sample envelope value (0-1) written to the internal buffer for the parent modulation chain

nodes.label: Monophonic
nodes.description: When enabled, all voices share a single envelope state

nodes.label: Retrigger
nodes.description: When enabled in monophonic mode, new notes restart the envelope from current value

nodes.label: Retrigger
nodes.description: Monophonic retrigger: immediately transitions to ATTACK from current value (no ramp to zero)
